name: Boykisser Apocalypse
description:
IMPORTANT NOTICES:

This bot has not been tested with JLLM and has only been used with a DeepSeek proxy. If there are any issues with other models, you may report them but I cannot guarantee I will put much of my time into upkeep.

This is also my first bot, so don’t go in expecting a masterpiece.

DESCRIPTION:

This bot was originally just meant to be just private, but I decided to make it public as there aren't really any bots of this type on Janitor.
This bot is heavily inspired by the many 'Infection' bots on chararacter.ai, but with the limitations on that platform, I wanted to try setting one up on Janitor instead.

Intro is pretty simple, I admit, but I find the open-endedness works out better than having the bot narrate an entire introduction for you.

🚨🚨Art used in thumbnail🚨🚨
creator: SamTheGayShark
